builder.unavailable: The workflow authoring routes are not wired on this deployment. Set ReadApiConfig.workflow_authoring in the composition root to enable them.
builder.purpose: Inspect the built-in workflows (a trigger plus an ordered chain of ActionType steps) and design a new one by chatting with the builder. New workflows are locked to shadow mode; promotion to enforce is a separate reviewed PR. Read-only by construction.
builder.headlineNew: Conversational workflow designer open - {count} ActionTypes available
builder.defaultMode: shadow (locked; promotion is a separate PR)

detail.catalogReadOnly: Available on this deployment. Catalog view is read-only.
detail.actionNotFound: ActionType {action} is not registered in this deployment.

chat.disclaimer: Conversational designer - saves private drafts only. Publishing and execution require separate reviewed paths.
chat.placeholderReady: Describe what should happen, or answer the question above...
chat.placeholderDisabled: Workflow authoring is not enabled on this deployment.
chat.yamlReady: YAML is available once the draft validates.
chat.validating: Validating the draft against the server-side schema and catalog references...
chat.retryHint: Nothing was lost - your answers are still captured. Retry when the connection is back, and the YAML and test will render.
chat.saveHintBeforePath: Saving creates a principal-owned private DRAFT. It cannot run or appear in Operations. The GitHub path proposes
chat.saveHintAfterPath: for separate catalog review; promotion remains a later governance change.
chat.proposeUnavailable: GitHub proposal link unavailable. Copy the validated YAML and add it to the catalog review path shown below.
chat.validationPassed: Passed - the draft is structurally valid, every step resolves to a real ActionType, and it loads cleanly. This check does not execute or simulate the workflow. A published draft still starts in shadow mode.
chat.issueOne: 1 issue to fix before this can be published:
chat.issueMany: {count} issues to fix before this can be published:

automations.heading: My automations
automations.description: Save a principal-scoped trigger configuration. Runtime dispatch is not active yet; ActionType ceilings remain authoritative when activation lands.

catalog.readOnlyBody: A workflow is a business process - a trigger plus an ordered chain of actions the control plane runs for you, each with a built-in safety net (stop-condition, rollback, blast-radius cap, audit). Describe what you want in plain words; the designer asks a few questions, shows you the exact YAML and a visual of how it runs, and lets you test it. YAML changes land through a PR. The Python task workbench uses its own validated artifact and typed proposal path.
catalog.pythonUnavailable: Python task authoring is not wired on this deployment.
catalog.description: The shipped workflows, for reference: open a row to see every step and the raw YAML.
catalog.empty: No workflows are available in this group.
catalog.filterPlaceholder: Filter by name, trigger, or mode...
catalog.workflowNotFound: Workflow {workflow} is not registered in this group. Choose a workflow from the table.
catalog.actionNotConnected: ActionType {action} is not connected to a workflow in this group.
